name: Rogzglowcat Safety Collar Small Blue Floral (Cb09-B)
description: Keep your feline safe and visible, day or night, with the Rogz Glow Cat Safety Collar . Designed for both comfort and security, this collar is ideal for everyday use and pet identification. Crafted from high-visibility reflective and glow-in-the-dark materials , the collar ensures your cat is seen even in low-light conditions perfect for night-time explorers. The snag-proof, durable webbing provides long-lasting wear without compromising on comfort. Equipped with the Rogz Safe lock breakaway buckle , this collar includes three adjustable load settings . It’s intelligently designed to release under pressure, helping your cat break free safely if the collar gets caught. With an 11mm width and an adjustable fit for neck sizes 20–31cm , it’s suitable for most adult cats. Key Features: Glow-in-the-dark and reflective for maximum night-time visibility Snag-proof, durable webbing for safe everyday wear Breakaway safety buckle with 3 variable load settings Adjustable fit : 20–31cm neck size | Width : 11mm Ideal for daily use and identification Give your cat the freedom to roam safely with the Rogz Glow Cat Safety Collar where safety meets style, even after dark.
